title: Bilhah #1090
definition:
Bilhah = "troubled"

 n pr f
 1) Rachel's handmaid whom she gave to Jacob as a concubine, mother to
    two of Jacob's children, Dan and Naphtali

 n pr loc
 2) a city in Simeon
nasbUsage:

 n pr f
